response.justification: Strong technical fundamentals across 14+ years and proven system design capability, but completely lacking the core experimentation platform, metrics/telemetry, and growth systems expertise essential to this Principal-level role. Career breadth is impressive but misdirected; would require substantial domain ramp-up rather than immediate IC6 impact. Current career gap and recent tenure volatility add minor concerns about availability and stability.
strengths: 14+ years diverse full-stack engineering with proven ability to design and ship systems at scale (millions of requests/second at Dunnhumby); recent exposure to modern AI tooling and developer platforms
Strong software fundamentals demonstrated through TDD, testing expertise, and infrastructure work (CI/CD, GitLab, Docker); ability to learn quickly across languages and domains
Open-source leadership on GISCollective and other projects demonstrates system architecture, cross-stakeholder influence, and willingness to mentor through workshops and community contributions
concerns: Zero documented experience with experimentation platforms, A/B testing frameworks, feature flagging systems, or rollout infrastructure—the core domain of this Principal role
No demonstrated expertise in metrics design, telemetry infrastructure, statistical analysis, or data science collaboration critical for a growth/experimentation systems leader
Currently in career gap (8 months as of May 2026) and recent tenure pattern shows 6-month stint at re:cinq and shorter roles before 3-year tenure at Optilyz; trajectory and availability unclear

key_factors.factor: Strong technical fundamentals and proven large-scale system architecture
Career gap and recent role tenure volatility
